## Key Insights

### 1. Real-time & Live Updates (9 PRs)

CNCF projects are heavily investing in real-time UX patterns. This aligns with our console's existing SSE implementation for dashboard cards and WebSocket connections for agent communication.

**Implications for KubeStellar Console:**
- Continue investing in our `useCache` + SWR pattern
- Monitor how other projects handle reconnection/retry logic
- Consider performance optimizations for high-frequency updates

### 2. Forms & Input (8 PRs)

Significant activity around form UX, validation, and configuration editors across CNCF projects.

**Notable PR:**
- **[Argo CD #27943](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/pull/27943): Contain settings textareas within panel width**
  - Fixed textarea overflow in settings panels
  - Relevant to our own settings UI and drill-down panels

**Implications for KubeStellar Console:**
- Review our form components for similar overflow issues
- Validate that our config editors (YAML, JSON) respect panel boundaries
- Consider textarea containment in drill-down views

### 3. Navigation & Search (5 PRs)

Deep linking, sidebar navigation, and search/filter patterns continue to evolve.

**Implications for KubeStellar Console:**
- Our `DrillDownProvider` stack navigation is aligned with industry patterns
- Consider adding deep-linking support for drill-down states
- Review search/filter UX in card data tables

### 4. Onboarding & Guided Setup (2 PRs)

First-run experience and setup wizards remain priorities.

**Implications for KubeStellar Console:**
- Our `/api/onboarding/*` endpoints support this pattern
- Consider expanding guided setup flows for new users
- Empty state CTAs (call-to-actions) in cards when no data exists

### 5. Theming & Dark Mode (2 PRs)

Theme switching continues to be refined across projects.

**Implications for KubeStellar Console:**
- Our 15+ theme system is ahead of the curve
- Continue using CSS variables for semantic tokens
- Monitor how other projects handle theme persistence
